no-render-fn-mutates-state.reason: month-end snapshot is the SINGLE sanctioned exception to "renders are pure"; writing monthlyHistory at month rollover requires render-time observation of the date change. tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: populateRoundupDestinationDropdown is called only when the user opens the Data & Backup sub-screen (post-boot, user-initiated); PLAN const is fully initialized by then. The `typeof PLAN !== 'undefined'` guard is defensive null-check, not a TDZ guard
tdz-safe-engine-access.condition: see Settings sub-screen open call paths

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: invoked from canvas row tap, post-boot user-event call path; PLAN is fully initialized. The `typeof PLAN !== 'undefined'` is a defensive null-check, not a TDZ guard

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: renderPaydaySavings is invoked at user-action time (sub-screen open or post-edit re-render), post-boot; PLAN is initialised. Defensive null check, not a TDZ guard

RESET_FLOW.showStage2 only fires after the user types RESET in stage 1 (post-boot, user-initiated); PLAN is fully initialized. The `typeof PLAN !== 'undefined'` checks are defensive null-guards, not TDZ guards
tdz-safe-engine-access.condition: see RESET_FLOW.start call path: user tap on red Reset row

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: sendChatMessage system-prompt builder runs only when user sends a chat message (post-boot); the `typeof PLAN !== 'undefined' && PLAN.X` checks are defensive null-guards, not TDZ guards

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: executeChatAction runs only after the AI returns a structured action from a user-initiated chat message; PLAN is fully initialized by then

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: BRAIN.plan.queryAffordability is invoked from user-action paths (chat handler, canvas tap) post-boot. PLAN is fully initialized by then. typeof guard is defensive null-check, not a TDZ guard

tdz-safe-engine-access.reason: getRoundUpDestinationName + setRoundUpDestination are methods on BRAIN.savings called only at user-event time (render, edit, txn save), never during boot; PLAN const has been initialized by then. The `typeof PLAN !== 'undefined'` guard is defensive, not a TDZ guard
